title: Two and a Half Men
subTitle: Charlie, a jingle writer, lives freely until his dull brother Alan and his 10-year-old nephew move into his Malibu beach house, forcing him to change.

title: Welcome to Waikiki
subTitle: Three young friends, dreaming of making a film, start a guesthouse. Unfortunately, it's not successful. They face challenges as they try to achieve their filmmaking goals.

title: Youth of May
subTitle: Amidst the Gwangju Uprising, a medical student and a nurse's lives entangle and they eventually fall for each other. As democratisation struggles continue, their love must stand the test of hardships.

title: When the Weather Is Fine
subTitle: Due to the freezing weather, the water pipeline in Hae-won's house freezes. Subsequently, Eun-seop and Hae-won begin to live together at the bookstore.
